name: Down To Scratch
address: 4816 Brecksville Rd Suite G, Richfield, OH 44286
about: Down To Scratch is a premier private golf studio offering best-in-class technology and instruction. They utilize a Full Swing Pro 2.0 Simulator with KIT Launch Monitor, V1 Video Analysis, Puttview, Visio Putting, Sportsbox AI, TrueTurnPro, and GolfForever. The studio provides a private lesson experience with open practice hours available for members. Pricing is available through lesson packages and memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Extensive list of premium golf technology including Full Swing Pro 2.0 Simulator, V1 Sports, and Puttview
Private, professional instruction from PGA-qualified coach Jason Goodendorf
Combination of high-tech indoor simulation and outdoor lesson options
Junior-focused programs with discounts and dedicated lesson packages
Membership options offering keycard access for open practice

food_and_drink.notes: No food or drink service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Video analysis and pressure mat systems

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The studio provides equipment, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for consistency.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, suggesting outside food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate is provided, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours for a full round.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior lessons with 30% off discounts and dedicated junior lesson packages.
